metadata.description: Primary references for systematic debugging, troubleshooting, logging, tracing, profiling, incident response, and AI-assisted debugging (2026 standard).

databases.name: PostgreSQL - pg_stat_statements
databases.description: Server-side query performance statistics for debugging slow queries.

ai_assisted_debugging.description: AI-assisted debugging workflows in Visual Studio 2026.

ai_assisted_debugging.description: Security guidance when using AI to summarize logs or propose fixes.

distributed_tracing_2026.name: Distributed Tracing Tools 2026
